title: cynoglossum baeticum
intro: Cynoglossum baeticum, also known as Spanish coltsfoot or Cynoglossum, is a perennial plant belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae) and native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, making it useful in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Cynoglossum baeticum include its ability to soothe and protect the mucous membranes, reducing inflammation and promoting relaxation. Cynoglossum baeticum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
